content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 29, 2006

Jim Hamlin, Board President
Mayers Memorial Hospital
P.O. Box 459
Fall River Mills, California 96028

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-170

Dear Mr. Hamlin:

Consistent with our telephone conversation of September 28, 2006, this correspondence confirms the withdrawal of your request for advice on behalf of Ruth Knoch and Les Cufaude regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

I:\AdviceLtrs\06-170

cc: Ruth Knoch, Board Member
Mayers Memorial Hospital
P.O. Box 459
Fall River Mills, California 96028

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
